calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2007 Continued To Apr-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Carolyn Morris, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a national banking association.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: International Plumbing Supplies, Inc., a corporation and Lam C. Nim as follows:
Principal $107,405.99
Prejudgment Interest $7,604.52
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Late Charges $148.80
Costs $510.00, for a total of $118,494.31
Judgment signed in open court.
